title: Nuba Mountains: A Fragile Refuge on Sudan's Front Line
detail: A DW field report from the Nuba Mountains in South Kordofan highlights the region as a precarious refuge for civilians caught between SAF and RSF front lines. The mountainous terrain has historically sheltered displaced populations and resistance fighters, but worsening fighting has eroded that protection. Humanitarian access remains severely constrained, and communities face acute food insecurity and lack of medical care as the conflict grinds into its fourth year.

media.caption: Nuba Mountains — a fragile refuge on Sudan's front line
